description: Add and subtract whole numbers up to 10,000 using standard algorithms and mental math strategies.
skills: Add 4-digit numbers with and without regrouping
Subtract 4-digit numbers with and without regrouping
Solve multi-step word problems involving addition and subtraction

models.name: Base Ten Blocks
models.description: Visualize trading 10 ones for 1 ten, 10 tens for 1 hundred, etc.

models.name: Number Line
models.description: Visualize jumping forward for addition or backwards for subtraction.

description: Understand multiplication of a 2-digit or 3-digit number by a 1-digit number.
skills: Multiply using arrays and area models

models.name: Array
models.description: Rows and columns showing equal groups. e.g., 4 rows of 5 is 20.

models.name: Area Model
models.description: Decompose numbers by place value to multiply parts separately.

description: Understand division 2-digit by 1-digit, and relate to multiplication fact families.
skills: Use related multiplication facts to solve division

models.name: Equal Sharing
models.description: Distribute items one by one into a set number of groups.

models.name: Fact Triangles
models.description: Show the relationship between the product and two factors.

description: Understand fractions less than or equal to one as parts of a whole or set.
skills: Relate fractions to decimals (tenths and hundredths)

models.name: Area Model
models.description: Shade parts of a shape to represent a fraction.

models.name: Number Line
models.description: Place fractions between 0 and 1 on a line.

description: Calculate area and perimeter of regular and irregular 2D shapes, especially rectangles.
skills: Find perimeter by adding all side lengths
Understand the difference between distance around (perimeter) and space inside (area)

models.name: Grid Paper
models.description: Count squares inside a shape for area, count the edges of squares around the shape for perimeter.
